ddls:
CREATE TABLE "immunizations" (
  "immunization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immunization record */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Business identifier for the immunization record */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the patient receiving the vaccination */,
  "vaccine_code" TEXT /* Code of the vaccine product administered */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date of vaccination or non-administration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the immunization event */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Identifier for the healthcare provider who administered the vaccine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the vaccine was administered */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine used */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Notes on any side effects experienced by the patient */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the immunization event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("immunization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunizations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunizations_vaccine_code FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_code") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunizations_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES immunization_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccines" (
  "vaccine_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the vaccine product */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the vaccine */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage requirements for the vaccine */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the vaccine */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccine record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccine record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "immunization_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, nurse, doctor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "immunization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the immunization record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_immunization_id FOREIGN KEY ("immunization_id") REFERENCES immunizations ("immunization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient receiving the notification */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, failed) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "immunization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the immunization record that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_immunization_id FOREIGN KEY ("immunization_id") REFERENCES immunizations ("immunization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, nurse) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination schedule record */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient for whom the schedule is defined */,
  "vaccine_code" TEXT /* Code of the vaccine for which a schedule is set */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next due date for the vaccine administration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vaccination schedule (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_schedules_vaccine_code FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_code") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_schedules_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
